category_sources: source_facts.description says MacVim is a GUI for vim made for macOS.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description names the project as MacVim; source_facts.name is macvim.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo point to the official GitHub project; the official GitHub wiki and README are documentation surfaces.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a macOS GUI for Vim; source_facts.executables lists Vim/MacVim commands.
